title: (Bullish Signal) AEYE enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Apr 14, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that AEYE's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 115 similar cases where AEYE's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 102 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 89%. Current price $25.10 crossed the support line at $25.16 and is trading between $25.16 support and $24.33 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/12/21 - 04/14/21, the price experienced a -11% Downtrend. During the week of 04/07/21 - 04/14/21, the stock fell -12%.

https://preview.redd.it/k9d9ujc0ndt61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=dddcd3885b884ff1a17ad464bcd95aada6261a67

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on April 14, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on AEYE as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 102 of 115 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 89%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for AEYE turned negative on April 14, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 50 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 45 of the 50 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 90%.

AEYE moved below its 50-day Moving Average on March 23, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where AEYE declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 85%.

AEYE broke above its upper Bollinger Band on March 19, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

The Aroon Indicator for AEYE entered a downward trend on March 16, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.
